name: 罗丝·德克尔
introduction: Rose Kathryn Decker is an American child actress. She began her career in print/runway modeling and TV commercials. At four years old, Rose played "Kenzie" on HBO's hit series Mare of Easttown. She soon went on to play "Rose", a prominent role in the Sundance winning film, Nanny (Prime Video). Rose has guest starred on season 9 of NBC's The Blacklist and Season 4 of Servant on Apple. She had recurring role as Ella Blake on Season 6 and 7 of FBI on CBS. She also appeared in the film Audrey's Children. She had been on The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon and The Late show with Stephen Colbert twice. In the Lifetime movie Kidnapped By a Killer:The Heather Robinson Story, she plays a Young Heather Robinson. Decker is an elementary student in Malvern, Pennsylvania. She enjoys participating in local live theater, doing gymnastics and performing on the silks. She has two older brothers and enjoys volunteering with animals and various outdoor adventures. Rose is represented by Nouveaux Talent Management and Zuri Agency in NYC and Reinhard Agency in Philadelphia.
